channel.title: Panasonic Holdings Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Panasonic Holdings Corporation (panasonic_holdings_corporation).

item.title: CVE-2025-11223 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Installer of Panasonic AutoDownloader version 1.2.8 contains an issue with the DLL search path, which may lead to loading a crafted DLL file in the same directory.

item.title: CVE-2025-1073 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: Panasonic IR Control Hub (IR Blaster) versions 1.17 and earlier may allow an attacker with physical access to load unauthorized firmware onto the device.

item.title: CVE-2024-7013 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in Control FPWIN Pro version 7.7.2.0 and all previous versions may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted project file.

item.title: CVE-2024-4162 · 4.4 MEDIUM — KW Watcher Vulnerability ALlows Malicious Read Access to Memory
item.description: A buffer error in Panasonic KW Watcher versions 1.00 through 2.83 may allow attackers malicious read access to memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-6315 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bouds read vulnerability in FPWin Pro version 7.7.0.0 and all previous versions may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted project file.

item.title: CVE-2023-6314 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in FPWin Pro version 7.7.0.0 and all previous versions may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted project file.

item.title: CVE-2023-4990 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Directory traversal vulnerability in MCL-Net versions prior to 4.6 Update Package (P01) may allow attackers to read arbitrary files.

item.title: CVE-2023-3472 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Use after free vulnerability in Panasonic KW Watcher versions 1.00 through 2.82 may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-3471 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Buffer overflow vulnerability in Panasonic KW Watcher versions 1.00 through 2.82 may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code.
